compatible_devices.notes: Backward compatible with all HCS-1 lighting modules; HCS-2 supports up to 50 total modules; max 256 HID fixtures per channel (512 total)

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Dimlux Maxi Controller EXE, Dimlux Expert 1000W
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Dimming, photoperiod, schedule, sunrise/sunset ramp, DLI
compatible_devices.notes: Backward compatible with HCS-1 modules; HCS-2 adds DLI control, cloud simulation, crop calendar scheduling

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Dimming, photoperiod, schedule, sunrise/sunset ramp, DLI
compatible_devices.notes: SunSystem LEC 630 not compatible; backward compatible with HCS-1 modules

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Gavita Pro 1000e, Nanolux e-ballast, Luxx 1000W DE
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Dimming, DLI, photoperiod, schedule, cloud simulation, crop calendar
compatible_devices.notes: Brands: Gavita, Nanolux, Luxx, Growers Choice, Illuminar, PL; up to 40 ballasts per adapter; HCS-2 adds DLI monitoring and web dashboard

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Fluence SPYDR 2x, HLG 650R, Gavita Pro 1700e LED
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: LMA-14 (Lighting Control Adapter F) or LMA-24 for DLI/lantern schedule
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Dimming, DLI, cloud/lantern schedule simulation, photoperiod, crop calendar, sub-zone lighting
compatible_devices.notes: Brands: Gavita, Fluence, Next Light, Photobio, HLG, Floraflex, Luxx, Growers Choice; 24 LEDs per LMA-14; LMA-24 uses both channels for lantern schedule (sunrise-to-sunset across canopy); HCS-2 also supports LMA-T spectrum tuning adapter

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Variable speed by temperature or humidity setpoint, day/night idle speed, sub-zone control
compatible_devices.notes: TSH-1 outputs 0-10V; any EC fan with 0-10V input; HCS-2 adds sub-zone control — link specific TSH-1 to specific zone sensor; same module works with HCS-1 and HCS-3

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Variable speed of 3-phase AC motors by temperature/humidity/CO2 setpoint
compatible_devices.notes: HCS-2 (Hydro-X Pro) specific feature; VFD-1 module connects to HCS-2, Delta-1 is the compact VFD drive; only for 3-phase motors — single-phase motors are NOT compatible; used for commercial/industrial inline fans and HVAC motors

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: On/off by temperature trigger (DST-1) or timer (DSP-1)
compatible_devices.notes: Single-phase AC fans up to 10A; on/off relay; HCS-2 supports up to 50 total modules so more stations possible than on HCS-1
Any AC circulation fan up to 10A; HCS-2 supports up to 50 total modules; 100-240V compatible

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: On/off by temperature setpoint, day/night programming, sub-zone control
compatible_devices.notes: Any heating/cooling device up to 10A; HCS-2 sub-zone feature allows linking specific DST-1 to specific zone's sensor; also covers portable AC units

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Mitsubishi mini-split, LG mini-split, Fujitsu mini-split
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature-triggered HVAC set-point control, sub-zone HVAC management
compatible_devices.notes: Works with most mini-split and some window AC units with IR remote; INCOMPATIBLE: Daikin, Mr. Cool, Innovair, Denali Aire, Cooper and Hunter; HCS-2 sub-zone allows per-zone mini-split control

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: On/off by humidity setpoint, day/night programming, sub-zone control
compatible_devices.notes: Any simple humidifier up to 10A; HCS-2 supports up to 50 modules (no per-category limit vs HCS-1's cap of 2 humidity stations); 100-240V

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: On/off by humidity setpoint, day/night programming, sub-zone control
compatible_devices.notes: Up to 10A (7A recommended); HCS-2 has no fixed limit on humidity stations within the 50-module total; 100-240V

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CAP CO2-4, Titan Controls Atlas 3, Green Air Products CE-3
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2-triggered on/off (built-in CO2 sensor via MBS-Pro), high-CO2 safety, day/night schedule
compatible_devices.notes: CO2 monitoring built into included MBS-Pro 4-in-1 sensor (no extra CO2 sensor needed unlike HCS-1); up to 10A; HCS-2 supports more CO2 stations than HCS-1's 2-station limit

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CO2 solenoid regulator on bottled CO2 tank
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2-triggered solenoid on/off, built-in CO2 sensor via MBS-Pro
compatible_devices.notes: CO2 solenoid regulators (tank-based) controlled identically to generators via DSC-1; CO2 ppm built into HCS-2 4-in-1 sensor — no separate CO2 sensor purchase required

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Full environmental monitoring (Temp, Humidity, CO2, DLI/PPFD, water content) for all control triggers; data logging; web dashboard; sub-zone sensor assignment
compatible_devices.notes: MBS-Pro 4-in-1 sensor included (Temp/Humidity/CO2/Light); max 50 sensors on HCS-2 (vs smaller limit on HCS-1); up to 1000m between controller and sensor; CSV data logging via MicroSD; web-based dashboard and 10.1-inch touchscreen

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Timer-based on/off; used for pumps, UV sterilizers, foggers, irrigation solenoids
compatible_devices.notes: Any device needing time-based control up to 10A; HCS-2 supports up to 50 total modules; 100-240V; DSP-2 also available as 240V variant
